headline: Cadence (CDNS) Up 17.4% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Continue?
summary: Cadence (CDNS) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.

headline: Synopsys Earnings Are Coming. AI and Merger Integration Are in Focus.
summary: Synopsis will report earnings after the close Wednesday. Investors are keen to see how the integration of Ansys is going after the $35 billion acquisition.
